label: Priya · Hinglish
transcript: Doodh, bread, eggs aur Lay's chips order kar dena. Aur thoda dahi bhi le lena.

label: Mom · Hindi (Devanagari)
transcript: मुझे आज पोहा बनाना है, सारी सामग्री मँगा देना। और थोड़ा अदरक-लहसुन का पेस्ट भी।

label: Friend · English
transcript: Hey, can you order Lays chips, two bottles of Coke, Oreos, and some paper cups for tonight? Around six people.

label: Spouse · Hinglish (period care)
transcript: Whisper pads aur dark chocolate jaldi mangwa do, plus Meftal Spas if available.
